Class BuWizz2ProtocolConstants

java.lang.Object
ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz2ProtocolConstants
public final class BuWizz2ProtocolConstants extends Object
Constants for the BuWizz 2.0 BLE protocol (API version 1.3).

All 128-bit UUIDs are stored as hex strings in standard UUID format. Byte values are expressed as int to avoid sign-extension issues.

    Field
    Description

    BOOTLOADER_SERVICE_UUID
    Bootloader Service UUID.

    Command byte: Set Current Limits.

    Command byte for the Device Status Report notification.

    Advertised BLE device name.

    Manufacturer data length in bytes.
    static final int
    MAX_PACKET_SIZE
    Maximum packet size in bytes for application commands.

    MFGR_APPLICATION_PREFIX
    Manufacturer data prefix byte indicating Application mode.
    static final byte
    MFGR_BOOTLOADER_PREFIX
    Manufacturer data prefix byte indicating Bootloader mode.
    static final double
    MOTOR_CURRENT_SCALE
    Motor current scale factor (amperes per ADC unit).
    static final int
    MOTOR_SPEED_FULL_FORWARD
    Motor speed: full forward (127).
    static final int
    MOTOR_SPEED_FULL_REVERSE
    Motor speed: full reverse (−127).
    static final int
    MOTOR_SPEED_STOP
    Motor speed: stop.
    static final double
    OUTPUT_VOLTAGE_BASE
    Output (motor) voltage base (volts).
    static final double
    OUTPUT_VOLTAGE_STEP
    Output voltage step per ADC unit (volts).
    static final int
    POWER_LEVEL_DISABLED
    Power level: disabled (motors off).
    static final int
    POWER_LEVEL_FAST
    Power level: Fast.
    static final int
    POWER_LEVEL_LDCRS
    Power level: LDCRS (low-distortion current regulation).
    static final int
    POWER_LEVEL_NORMAL
    Power level: Normal.
    static final int
    POWER_LEVEL_SLOW
    Power level: Slow.
    static final int
    STATUS_BATTERY_LEVEL_MASK
    Status byte mask for battery level (bits 4–3).
    static final int
    STATUS_BATTERY_LEVEL_SHIFT
    Status byte bit shift for battery level.
    static final int
    STATUS_CHARGING_BIT
    Status byte bit: charging (bit 5).
    static final int
    STATUS_ERROR_BIT
    Status byte bit: error flag (bit 0).
    static final int
    STATUS_USB_CONNECTED_BIT
    Status byte bit: USB connected (bit 6).

  • Method Summary

  • Field Details

    • DEVICE_NAME

      public static final String DEVICE_NAME
      Advertised BLE device name.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • MANUFACTURER_DATA_LENGTH

      public static final int MANUFACTURER_DATA_LENGTH
      Manufacturer data length in bytes.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • MFGR_BOOTLOADER_PREFIX

      public static final byte MFGR_BOOTLOADER_PREFIX
      Manufacturer data prefix byte indicating Bootloader mode. Full bootloader data: 05:4E:42:6F:6F:74 ("BuWizz Boot").
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • MFGR_APPLICATION_PREFIX

      public static final byte MFGR_APPLICATION_PREFIX
      Manufacturer data prefix byte indicating Application mode. Full application data: 05:4E:42:57:&lt;fwMaj&gt;:&lt;fwMin&gt; ("BuWizz BW").
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • APPLICATION_SERVICE_UUID

      public static final String APPLICATION_SERVICE_UUID
      Application Service UUID.

      Raw bytes MSB-first: 93:6E:67:B1:19:99:B3:88:81:44:FB:74:00:00:05:4E

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • BOOTLOADER_SERVICE_UUID

      public static final String BOOTLOADER_SERVICE_UUID
      Bootloader Service UUID.

      Raw bytes MSB-first: 0F:DC:A4:95:E6:CD:0E:90:BA:46:98:AC:C1:A4:05:4E

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • APPLICATION_DATA_UUID

      public static final String APPLICATION_DATA_UUID
      Application Data Descriptor UUID (short 16-bit: 0x92D1). Write commands here; enable notify CCCD for status reports.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • APPLICATION_DATA_HANDLE

      public static final int APPLICATION_DATA_HANDLE
      Application Data Descriptor handle.

      On this device the characteristic is at handle 0x03.

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • APPLICATION_CCCD_HANDLE

      public static final int APPLICATION_CCCD_HANDLE
      Client Characteristic Configuration Descriptor (CCCD) handle for enabling Application notifications.

      Write 0x0001 to this handle to enable notifications.

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • BOOTLOADER_DATA_UUID

      public static final String BOOTLOADER_DATA_UUID
      Bootloader Data Descriptor UUID (short 16-bit: 0x0001).
      See Also:

      public static final int BOOTLOADER_DATA_HANDLE
      Bootloader Data Descriptor handle.

      Maximum packet size in bytes for application commands.

      Status byte bit: USB connected (bit 6).

    • BATTERY_VOLTAGE_BASE

      public static final double BATTERY_VOLTAGE_BASE
      Battery voltage base (volts). Formula: V = BATTERY_VOLTAGE_BASE + rawByte * BATTERY_VOLTAGE_STEP
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • BATTERY_VOLTAGE_STEP

      public static final double BATTERY_VOLTAGE_STEP
      Battery voltage step per ADC unit (volts).
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • OUTPUT_VOLTAGE_BASE

      public static final double OUTPUT_VOLTAGE_BASE
      Output (motor) voltage base (volts). Formula: V = OUTPUT_VOLTAGE_BASE + rawByte * OUTPUT_VOLTAGE_STEP
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • OUTPUT_VOLTAGE_STEP

      public static final double OUTPUT_VOLTAGE_STEP
      Output voltage step per ADC unit (volts).
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • MOTOR_CURRENT_SCALE

      public static final double MOTOR_CURRENT_SCALE
      Motor current scale factor (amperes per ADC unit).
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • CMD_SET_MOTOR_DATA

      public static final int CMD_SET_MOTOR_DATA
      Command byte: Set Motor Data. Format: [0x10][spd1][spd2][spd3][spd4][brakeFlags] Speed encoding: 0x81 (−127) = full reverse, 0x00 = stop, 0x7F (127) = full forward. Brake flags (bits 3–0, LSB = motor 1): 1 = slow-decay (brake), 0 = fast-decay (coast).
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • CMD_SET_POWER_LEVEL

      public static final int CMD_SET_POWER_LEVEL
      Command byte: Set Power Level. Format: [0x11][powerLevel] Levels: 0=disabled, 1=Slow, 2=Normal, 3=Fast, 4=LDCRS. Default after connect: 0.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • CMD_SET_CURRENT_LIMITS

      public static final int CMD_SET_CURRENT_LIMITS
      Command byte: Set Current Limits. Format: [0x20][limit1][limit2][limit3][limit4] Each byte is unsigned; step = 33 mA. Default on connect: 750 mA each.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • MOTOR_SPEED_FULL_REVERSE

      public static final int MOTOR_SPEED_FULL_REVERSE
      Motor speed: full reverse (−127).
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

      public static final int MOTOR_SPEED_STOP
      Motor speed: stop.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • MOTOR_SPEED_FULL_FORWARD

      public static final int MOTOR_SPEED_FULL_FORWARD
      Motor speed: full forward (127).
      See Also:
